title: erofs-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.8.10-1]
- Update to the 1.8.10 release.
  Resolves: RHEL-106459

[1.8.4-3]
- erofs-utils: fix endianness issue
  Resolves: RHEL-86463
